challengeConstraints: submission artifact must fit within 16,000,000 bytes
leaderboard submissions must reproduce in under 10 minutes on 8xH100
primary metric is tokenizer-agnostic FineWeb validation compression reported as val_bpb
submission should be a reproducible PR adding a record folder with README, submission.json, train.log, and runnable code
hiringSignals: shows creativity and rigor on unfamiliar problems
can stand out through challenge participation and quality of execution
openQuestions: exact evaluation environment details are still being clarified publicly
README wording around the 10-minute requirement has prompted clarification questions
